body_txt: A character, almost Always Female , who tends to stand out in appearance and demeanor. They tend to be slight in stature and frail, often to give the impression of a Broken Bird , with a cold expression indicating either Tranquil Fury or Thousand-Yard Stare . This often incites The Hero in a Call to Adventure , as they decide to protect her while on their quest . She often ends up being a Living MacGuffin , connected to something of immense power such as being The Chosen One or a Barrier Maiden . May eventually be revealed to be of royal birth , or a goddess in disguise . Often helps to have amnesia to leave all these disparate clues a mystery for as long as possible . But occasionally you'll just have a common birth waif. There are two key parts: The hero may end up getting involved with her story without really knowing what is happening or what he's getting into. Likely to end up a target of the Evil Empire , and the hero has a serious moment of doubt once he discovers he's gotten into something big and dangerous. But their Big Brother Instinct kicks in regardless. Particularly common in the RPG genre for video games. This character often has other additional elements of appearance and gameplay. See the subtrope Mystical Waif for more details about this variant. Often wears an Ethereal White Dress . See also Waif Prophet , Oracular Urchin , and Manic Pixie Dream Girl . Mysterious Woman is usually sexy instead of Moe . Sub-Trope of Mysterious Stranger .
